{{Infobox character
| name = Soul Collector
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Soul Collector
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Soul Collector Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]], known as the Soul Collector, is a highly respected [[Great Elder]] who exists in myth and legend. He is characterized as a shrewd and dangerous bargainer whose deals frequently result in misfortune for the other party, often requiring extreme desperation or intelligence to survive. While his title suggests an interest in souls, [[Kelarac]] clarifies that he prefers the name because it implies total ownership over humans—including their bodies, minds, and service. He views himself as a collector of whole objects rather than fragments. Physically, he is described as wearing a metal blindfold and various pieces of jewelry, sometimes appearing with a distorted face. He is believed to be sealed at the bottom of the ocean, and sailors often reference him in that context. [[Kelarac]] possesses the ability to summon treasures and move objects, and he has been known to grant gifts or wishes in exchange for specific items or service.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Soul Collector]] is someone people can have a link to.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Soul Collector]] is a being that stepped out from a [[void]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Soul Collector]] is a character who wanted something to do with a [[Consultant]] assassin.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]], who is widely known as the Soul Collector, possesses the ability to grant wishes provided that a person follows a compass. During an encounter, he watched [[Calder]] with an unreadable expression while [[Jerri]] established a personal connection with him. [[Bliss]] suspected that the Soul Collector's actions were intended to catch [[Kelarac]] off-guard. Ultimately, he prepared himself to spend the final remnants of his collection.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Soul Collector]] can grant wishes in exchange for following a compass.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Soul Collector]] watched [[Calder]] unreadably.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] made a personal connection with the [[Soul Collector]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kelarac]] is known as the [[Soul Collector]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c20">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Soul Collector]] is someone [[Bliss]] suspects wanted to catch [[Kelarac]] off-guard.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Soul Collector]] is ready to spend the last of his collection.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
